---
# title: "PEH Data"
toc: false
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
---

<!-- ## Interactive PEH data explorer -->

<!-- The interactive explorer below allows you to browse PEH codebooks and studies. -->
<!-- The application runs on a separate Shiny server and is embedded here for convenience. -->

```{=html}
<!-- <style> -->
<!-- /* Break out of Quarto content width */ -->
<!-- .peh-embed-wrap { -->
<!--   width: 100vw; -->
<!--   margin-left: calc(-50vw + 50%); -->

<!--   /* KEY FIX: avoid calc(100vh - x) */ -->
<!--   height: 85vh; -->
<!--   min-height: 900px; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- /* iframe fills wrapper */ -->
<!-- .peh-embed-wrap iframe { -->
<!--   width: 100%; -->
<!--   height: 100%; -->
<!--   border: none; -->
<!--   display: block; -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- /* reduce extra vertical padding above/below */ -->
<!-- main.content { -->
<!--   padding-bottom: 0; -->
<!-- } -->
<!-- </style> -->
<style>
.peh-embed-wrap{
  width:100vw;
  margin-left:calc(-50vw + 50%);
  height: 92vh;
  min-height: 650px;
}
.peh-embed-wrap iframe{width:100%;height:100%;border:0;display:block;}

/* Small screens: reduce min-height to avoid forced double scroll */
@media (max-width: 992px){
  .peh-embed-wrap{
    height: 88vh;
    min-height: 520px;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="peh-embed-wrap">
  <iframe
    src="https://vito-epi.shinyapps.io/peh_data/"
    title="PEH Data Explorer"
    loading="lazy"
  ></iframe>
</div>
